panels.title: CPU Request
panels.description: The amount of guaranteed CPU (in cores) assigned for Namespace selected

node_configs.exp: sum by (k8s_namespace_name) (avg by (k8s_container_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_pod_name) (k8s_container_cpu_request{k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_cluster_name="$cluster"}))

panels.title: Memory Request
panels.description: The amount of guaranteed Memory assigned for Namespace selected

node_configs.exp: sum by (k8s_namespace_name) (avg by (k8s_container_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_pod_name) (k8s_container_memory_request{k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_cluster_name="$cluster"}))

panels.title: Network Error
panels.description: Number of network Input/output errors by Namespace

node_configs.exp: sum by (k8s_namespace_name, direction) (avg by (k8s_namespace_name, k8s_pod_name, direction) (k8s_pod_network_errors{k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", cluster="$cluster"}))

panels.title: Network IO Rate
panels.description: Rate of network input/output in bytes per second by Namespace

panels.title: Replicaset
panels.description: Pod Available vs Desired in Replicaset

panels.title: Deployment
panels.description: Number of Pods Available vs Desired

panels.title: Pods by CPU Request Utilization
panels.description: Represents how much CPU a pod is using compared to its requested CPU

panels.title: Pods by Memory Request Utilization
panels.description: Represents how much Memory a pod is using compared to its requested Memory

panels.title: Running Pods
panels.description: Number of Pods running in the Namespace

panels.title: CPU Limit
panels.description: The amount of CPU (in cores) that is allowed to be used by Namespace selected

node_configs.exp: sum by (k8s_namespace_name) (avg by (k8s_container_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_pod_name) (k8s_container_cpu_limit{k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_cluster_name="$cluster"}))

panels.title: Memory Limit
panels.description: The amount of Memory that is allowed to be used by Namespace selected

node_configs.exp: sum by (k8s_namespace_name) (avg by (k8s_container_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_pod_name) (k8s_container_memory_limit{k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_cluster_name="$cluster"}))

panels.title: Error State
panels.description: This panel shows pod's which are in error state

panels.title: CPU Usage
panels.description: Total CPU Usage in Cores by Namespace

panels.title: CPU Usage - Total Cluster
panels.description: Total CPU Usage in Cores by Cluster

node_configs.exp: sum by (k8s_namespace_name) (avg by (k8s_container_name, k8s_node_name, k8s_pod_name) (container_memory_working_set{k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_cluster_name="$cluster"}))

panels.title: Pod Usage
panels.description: Pod details based on Namespace selected
